pages.text: 从前，在一片绿绿的大草地上，住着一只小兔子，名字叫咘咘。咘咘有长长的耳朵，粉粉的鼻子，最喜欢蹦蹦跳跳。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a cute white baby bunny with long ears and pink nose, standing in a lush green meadow, golden sunset light, soft and warm, children's picture book illustration, extremely cute and appealing to toddlers

pages.text: 咘咘有两个最好的朋友。一个是小浣熊小米，她有蓝色的条纹，特别聪明，什么都会做。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a cute raccoon with blue stripes wearing a blue striped sweater, waving happily, lush green meadow background, children's picture book, warm lighting, extremely cute

pages.text: 另一个是小鸟小诺，他有红红的羽毛，飞得又高又快，特别勇敢。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a cute small red bird with bright red feathers, flying cheerfully in blue sky, fluffy clouds, children's picture book illustration, warm and vibrant colors

pages.text: 每天晚上睡觉前，咘咘都会跑到小山坡上，看天上的月亮。“月亮月亮，晚安！”咘咘会大声说。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a cute white baby bunny sitting on a small grassy hill, looking up at a big bright full moon in dark blue night sky, stars twinkling, peaceful and dreamy atmosphere, children's picture book

pages.text: 可是有一天晚上，咘咘抬头一看——咦？月亮不见了！天上黑黑的，一个月亮都没有！
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a cute white baby bunny looking up at empty dark night sky with worried expression, no moon visible, only a few stars, grassy hill, children's picture book, slightly dramatic lighting

pages.text: “月亮去哪里了？”咘咘着急了。她赶紧去找好朋友小米帮忙。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a worried cute white baby bunny running through meadow at night toward a treehouse, motion blur, night sky without moon, children's picture book illustration

pages.text: 小浣熊小米正在树洞里看书。“小米小米，月亮不见了！你能帮我找找吗？”咘咘说。小米推了推眼镜说：“别急，我们一起去找！”
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a cute raccoon with blue stripes wearing tiny glasses reading a book inside a cozy tree hollow, a worried white baby bunny at the entrance, warm lamp light inside, children's picture book

pages.text: 小鸟小诺也飞过来了。“我从天上找！”小诺拍拍翅膀，飞得高高的，到处看。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a cute red bird flying high in dark night sky searching around, a white bunny and blue-striped raccoon looking up from below on the ground, stars in sky, children's picture book

pages.text: “我找到了！我找到了！”小诺从天上喊下来。“月亮在池塘里！快来看！”
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a cute red bird hovering excitedly above a pond, pointing down with wing, the full moon perfectly reflected in the still water surface, night scene, children's picture book, magical glow

pages.text: 咘咘和小米跑到池塘边，低头一看——哇！水里真的有一个月亮！圆圆的，亮亮的，好漂亮！
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a cute white bunny and blue-striped raccoon looking down into a pond, beautiful full moon reflection in crystal clear water, night scene with fireflies, children's picture book, magical atmosphere

pages.text: 咘咘伸出小爪子想去捞月亮——扑通！水花溅了大家一脸！月亮碎成了好多小亮片，一闪一闪的。“哎呀！月亮碎了！”咘咘急得快哭了。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a cute white bunny with paw in pond water, water splashing, moon reflection broken into shimmering fragments, raccoon and red bird getting splashed, funny and cute expressions, night scene, children's picture book

pages.text: 小米擦了擦脸上的水，笑着说：“咘咘你抬头看！”咘咘抬起头——月亮好好的挂在天上呢！又大又圆又亮！
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a cute white bunny looking up amazed at a big beautiful full moon now visible in the night sky, raccoon pointing up smiling, red bird perched on raccoon's head, magical moonlight, children's picture book, wonder and joy

pages.text: “水里的是月亮的影子呀！真正的月亮一直都在天上。”小米说。咘咘开心地笑了：“原来月亮一直都在！”
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, three friends together - white bunny, blue-striped raccoon, and red bird - all smiling happily under beautiful full moon, moonlight bathing them in soft glow, meadow at night, warm and heartfelt, children's picture book

pages.text: 三个好朋友手拉手走回家。咘咘钻进暖暖的被窝，看着窗外的月亮说：“月亮月亮，晚安！咘咘也要睡觉啦！”然后，咘咘闭上眼睛，做了一个甜甜的梦。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a cute white baby bunny tucked in a cozy bed with soft blankets, looking out window at full moon, sleepy happy expression, warm bedside lamp, stuffed raccoon and bird toys beside the pillow, peaceful dreamy atmosphere, children's picture book
